name: Thai Kai Tam Mamuang (Chicken and Mango Soup)
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Phak chi (coriander/cilantro), chopped [including the stems and roots]
Ton hom (spring onion), sliced thinly, for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the stock to a boil.
2. Add the fish sauce and sugar. Stir until dissolved.
3. Add the chicken, half the ginger, shallots, and pepper. Simmer covered for 3 minutes, or until the chicken is tender.
4. Add the remaining ingredients and simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
5. Garnish with coriander leaves and spring onions before serving.
Serves 4
